nasb.text: just as it is written, “God gave them a spirit of stupor, Eyes to see not and ears to hear not, Down to this very day.”

esv.text: as it is written, “God gave them a spirit of stupor, eyes that would not see and ears that would not hear, down to this very day.”

cnv.text: 正如經上所記： “　神給了他們麻木的靈， 有眼睛卻看不見， 有耳朵卻聽不到， 直到今日。”

ccb.text: 正如圣经上说： “上帝使他们至今心智昏迷， 眼睛看不见，耳朵听不到。”

csbs.text: 正如经上所记： “神给了他们昏迷的心灵、 看不见的眼睛、听不见的耳朵， 直到今天。”
